programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael cooks up all of John's favorite dishes, starting with her spicy-sweet Bucatini all'Amatriciana, a pasta dish inspired by her mother's all-America recipe.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: When Justin and Ashlee take on the flip of a ramshackle two-unit property, they conspire to draw a skeptical Duke and Keith into the mix to fend off a mysterious squatter and complete the tricky multifamily house makeover.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: The team faces a house with flea-infested carpets and a putrid smell, but when the neighbors pitch in to help, the team gets excited to turn the house into a home.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: The team tackles two Frankenzombies, hoping to flip these wrecks into cash-rich homes; one property threatens to bleed resources while a mid-century mess is brewing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard is faced with a big dilemma, do flip and friendship go together?; his longtime friend Carrie, friend to his wife Clair, has fallen on some tough times and wants James' help; recently divorced and eager for financial freedom, Carrie convinces James she can handle the project even though she is a complete novice; together, they tackle a mid-century modern disaster with an unfinished ba

programme.title: Million Dollar Mountain Homes
programme.desc: Laura and Shawn are moving to Blue Ridge to be closer to aging family in Atlanta. From turnkey luxury to a budget-friendly log cabin, will these big city buyers opt for ease or something they can put their own stylish stamp on?

programme.title: Million Dollar Mountain Homes
programme.desc: Alex and Michael fell in love with the Blue Ridge Mountains after a recent vacation. From a turret with a winding staircase to a cozy, Creekside hot tub, the high-end features are endless. But when weighing views against guest space and proximity to Atlanta, which mountain home will start our buyers' next chapter?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy changes his game and pursues a locker with collectibles; Mary looks for quick-sale items; Darrell calls upon a friend for assistance when he is tested by local Mission Hills buyers.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi and Jarrod's mischievous side emerges during the action in Victorville, Calif.; Ivy grabs a locker that no one else can tolerate; Mary puts the new guy in his place.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The regulars encounter a mob of eager newbies in Riverside, Calif.; Barry purchases a "mystery trunk"; Darrell acquires a box of old books.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The ladies from Vegas try their own bidding style; Brandi and Jarrod try to phone it in; Kenny and his brother show everyone that family comes second.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dave gets in touch with his lighter side as the buyers visit Fontana, Calif.; Mary tries to add a touch of Texas to the festivities; Jarrod and Brandi attempt to recover from a bad purchase.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy is particularly excited when the buyers return to Fontana, Calif.; Darrell and Brandon look to score heavy, while Mary works her way up from the bottom.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Mary feels out of place in high-society Palm Springs, Calif.; Ivy keeps his eyes open for vintage items; Darrell battles Rene.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Ontario, Calif., Jarrod overpays for some toys and Darrell has an encounter with "the Man"; Barry faces his own mortality.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi uncover a sweet locker in Santa Ana, Calif.; Mary looks for something more collectible; Darrell's find may equal another big win for the Gambler.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Gardena, Calif., the buyers gamble on a sportsman's locker and a load of construction equipment; Barry arrives with a secret weapon.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers try their luck in Inglewood, Calif.; Darrell talks big but comes up empty; Barry takes a gamble on an ugly-looking unit.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers battle in Rancho Cucamonga, Calif.; Dave Hester arrives in a truck large enough to fit his ego; Jarrod and Brandi obtain a vintage mask; Barry Weiss scores with a rock 'n' roll legend.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: It's a spooky All Hallow's Eve in Huntington Beach, as Kenny books an appearance with his dark side; Brandi finds evidence of a possible payday; Ivy does what he can with whatever he has; Mary's locker requires some rescuing.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Modern-day pirates blindly bid on abandoned storage units that may contain junk or treasure.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dave is joined by his biggest fan, who helps him sink a winning locker; Emily is determined to salvage a profit from a smaller unit; Lisa puts her faith in Karma, and it treats her like royalty; Kenny carves out some monies in record time.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Revival
programme.desc: Willie is on a mission in Texas—part wild outdoor adventure, part secret scouting trip to size up Christian and Jacob for Duck and Buck Commander jobs. At home, Sadie juggles a big conference and baby shower plans, Si checks something unique off his bucket list and the Robertson clan welcomes a brand-new family member!

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Bathed in the heat of Moreno Valley, Kenny has difficulty with names, so he calls an audible; Brandi can't catch a break without some help from above; Dave gets stuck with the business end of an unsatisfying locker; Dusty and Lupe put their "street" smarts to good use.
